name: property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, reconciling multiple utility bills causes cash flow gaps. We aggregate and reconcile utility bills instead of manual reconciliation of utility bills.
problem_solved: Reconciling multiple utility bills can lead to cash flow gaps.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Reconciling multiple utility bills can lead to cash flow gaps.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, reconciling multiple utility bills causes cash flow gaps. We aggregate and reconcile utility bills instead of manual reconciliation of utility bills.
